name: Rocket Kids' Decorative Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Encourage your kid to reach for the stars by gifting them the Rocket Kids' Decorative Pillow from Pillowfort™. This decorative pillow is designed in the shape of a rocket with a cute mouth and eyes for a whimsical look. Made of 100% recycled polyester terry fabric with 100% polyester fiber filling, this plush pillow is super soft and cozy.
